error.bad-gateway: The server received an invalid response. Please try again later.
error.bad-request: The request could not be processed. Please check the submitted data.
error.conflict: A conflict occurred with the current state of the resource.
error.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
error.internal-server-error: An internal server error occurred. Please try again later.
error.invalid-child: The field {{childField}} is not valid for parent {{parentField}}.
error.invalid-field-pattern: The field {{fieldName}} does not match the expected pattern.
error.invalid-field-range: The field {{fieldName}} must be between {{min}} and {{max}}.
error.invalid-field-type: The field {{fieldName}} must be of type {{expectedType}}.
error.invalid-field-value: The field {{fieldName}} has an invalid value.
error.not-found: The requested resource was not found.
error.service-unavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
error.title: Error
error.too-many-requests: Too many requests. Please try again later.
error.unauthorized: Your session has expired or you are not authenticated. Please log in again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
